name: Cold Cellophane Noodles with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 large chicken breasts (about 1 pound total), skinned and boned
1/4 pound asparagus, blanched al dente and cut into 2-inch pieces
1 small cucumber, peeled, seeded, and cut into 2-inch batons
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the marinade: Combine the soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, minced garlic, minced fresh ginger, sesame oil, and sugar in a non-reactive dish. Place the chicken breasts into the marinade, turning to coat both sides. Cover and refrigerate for 4 hours.
2. Prepare the cellophane noodles: Drop the noodles into hot water. Stir and let sit for 10 minutes or until glassy and soft. Drain, rinse under cold water, and reserve.
3. Make the dressing: In a small bowl, mix together wasabi powder and 1 tablespoon water. Let sit for 5 minutes. Add rice wine vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and sesame oil. Mix well.
4. Slice the chicken breasts thinly.
5. Toss together the prepared noodles, chicken, asparagus, cucumbers, and dressing in a bowl.
6. Place a bed of spinach on a salad plate. Arrange the noodle salad in the center of the spinach.
7. Garnish with green onions.
Yield: 4 servings
